conversation.content: True or False: The Roman Empire fell in 476 CE. Answer your final answer Answer: True or False

False. The deposition of Romulus Augustulus in 476 CE marks the fall of the Western Roman Empire, but the Eastern Roman (Byzantine) Empire continued until 1453 CE, so saying "the Roman Empire" fell in 476 is incomplete.

then the answer: False
